attributes.action: Instead of learning MFL in schools learn BSL(British Sign Language)
attributes.additional_details: It would help people communicate to those HOH (hard of hearing/Deaf) as some people struggle to communicate  and you might wake up deaf one day and it would be a nice thing to do so the dead/how community can be heard
attributes.background: I want the government/parliament to start teaching British Sign Language across all schools in the UK instead of Morden foreign languages (MFL) so the deaf/hard of hearing community can be heard

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Make sign language a compulsory subject in secondary schools across England
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749914

Introduce British Sign Language (BSL) to all primary school children
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/745665

Require schools to teach British Sign Language from Key Stage 2 & at GCSE
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754981
